# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

image: python:latest

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

cache:
  paths:
    - .pip_cache/

before_script:
  - python -V  # Print out python version for debugging
  - pip install -r requirements.txt --cache-dir .pip_cache

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests..."
    # Replace with actual test command. example:
    # - pytest

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building the package..."
    # Replace with actual build command. example:  
    # - python setup.py bdist_wheel

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying the application..."
    # Replace with actual deploy command. example:  
    # - scp dist/your-package-version.whl deploy@your.server:/path
